neighborhoods.name: Pedasi Centro
neighborhoods.description: Small Azuero fishing town with colonial church, central plaza, and a growing international community
neighborhoods.character: Small colonial fishing town, growing international
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Pedasí. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Playa Venao
neighborhoods.description: Popular surf beach 30 minutes from Pedasi with beach bars and boutique hotels

housing.predominantType: Beach houses, surf shacks, and boutique properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Pedasí's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Las Tablas
neighborhoods.description: Larger town north of Pedasi known for Carnival celebrations and more affordable services

housing.predominantType: Houses and apartments at lower prices

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Playa Destiladeros / Playa Los Destiladores
neighborhoods.description: Beaches near Pedasi where expats build houses with ocean views and direct beach access
neighborhoods.character: Ocean-view beach, expat homes, direct beach access

housing.predominantType: Custom beach houses and oceanview properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
